title: Food Safety Management Systems
description: Comprehensive course on quality and safety management of food products

intro.title: 📖 Course Introduction
intro.description: In current economic conditions, rapid changes in the external environment require enterprises to build and operate quality management systems, as this determines the efficiency of these enterprises.

goal.title: Course Goal
goal.description: The lecture notes are devoted to solving an actual scientific and applied problem of developing theoretical and methodological foundations for assessing the quality of enterprise management systems, as well as practical recommendations for their implementation.

competencies.title: Competencies
competencies.subtitle: According to the requirements of the educational and professional program "Technological Expertise and Food Safety", applicants should acquire the ability to obtain competencies:
competencies.integralDescription: solve tasks of research and/or innovative nature in the field of food technologies
generalItems: to search, process and analyze information from various sources
conduct research at the appropriate level
professionalItems: develop programs for the effective functioning of food industry enterprises
present and discuss the results of scientific research and projects
ensure the quality and safety of food products
knowledge of legislative and regulatory documents

results.title: Learning Outcomes
results.description: Applicants should achieve the following program learning outcomes:
results.result5: Make effective decisions, evaluate and compare alternatives in the field of food technologies, including in uncertain situations and in the presence of risks
results.result6: Assess and eliminate risks and uncertainties when making technological and organizational decisions in production conditions to ensure the quality and safety of food products

keyPoint.title: Key Point
keyPoint.description: In the food industry, the most recognized standards that establish requirements for management systems are such standards as ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, IFS, BRC. An overview of these standards is also presented in this publication.

authors.title: About the Authors
authors.popovaTitle: PhD in Technical Sciences, Assoc. Prof.
authors.mysyuraTitle: PhD in Technical Sciences, Assoc. Prof.
authors.reviewer: Reviewer: Arsenieva L.Yu., Dr. of Technical Sciences, Prof.

topic1.title: Theoretical substantiation of management system effectiveness
topic1.description: Quality of management system, controlling and its role in ensuring quality

topic2.title: Methodological approach to effectiveness assessment
topic2.description: Process scheme, personnel, management potential, organizational climate

topic4.title: Effectiveness diagnostics methodology
topic4.description: Conceptual approach, functional character, adaptation model

topic5.title: BRC Standard
topic5.description: BRC Global Standard — Food, characteristics, features
